title: MfaChallenge
description: One in-flight MFA challenge — the row in the shared auth_mfa_challenges ledger (owned by identity/auth). Ephemeral by design (5-minute TTL, hard-purged on expiry or consumption). Referenced here for documentation completeness — this module dispatches CREATE / VERIFY / EXPIRE against the ledger but does NOT own the schema.

x-ownership.description: The auth_mfa_challenges table is a SHARED LEDGER for every authentication-related challenge (MFA, password-reset, email-verification). This module (mfa) uses only the MFA subset — rows where method IN ('totp', 'webauthn', 'recovery_code'). Password-reset + email-verification challenges are handled by identity/auth directly.
x-ownership.repository_binding: Academorix\Auth\Contracts\MfaChallengeRepositoryInterface (bound in identity/auth); mfa module injects this to CREATE / VERIFY / EXPIRE / INVALIDATE challenges.

x-eloquent.note: The MODEL lives in identity/auth. This schema documents the shape mfa sees when reading through the repository contract.

x-database.description: Ephemeral ledger table. Rows are hard-purged on expiry (`expires_at < now()`) or consumption (successful verify or max_attempts exhausted). No SoftDeletes — retention is via activity_log entries for MfaChallengeSucceeded / MfaChallengeFailed.

id.description: Prefixed ULID: `mfc_<26 chars>`. Used as the challenge_id path parameter on POST /me/mfa/challenge/{challenge_id}/verify.

identity_id.description: FK to identities.id. Resolves the caller for constant-time secret lookup.

method.description: Enum: totp / webauthn / recovery_code — dispatches to the right challenger at verify time.

state.description: Enum: pending / succeeded / failed / expired / invalidated.

webauthn_challenge.description: 32-byte random challenge nonce for WebAuthn method (per W3C spec § 5.1.3 step 5). Null for other methods.

webauthn_credential_id_hint.description: Optional hint for which WebauthnCredential is expected to answer this challenge. Null = any credential registered on the Identity is acceptable.

attempts_remaining.description: Decrement per failed verify. When zero, challenge is invalidated + caller must restart. Default from config('mfa.challenge.max_attempts') = 3.

request_ip.description: IP that issued the challenge. Fed into MfaSuspiciousActivityDetector's rolling window on any subsequent MfaChallengeFailed.

expires_at.description: Issued_at + config('mfa.challenge.ttl_minutes'). Rows past this are hard-purged.

consumed_at.description: Timestamp of successful verify. When non-null, the row cannot be verified again — atomic single-use.

indexes.name: auth_mfa_challenges_expiry_scan_idx
indexes.description: Speeds up the identity/auth-owned PurgeExpiredMfaChallengesJob scan.

x-wire.note: The MfaChallenge row is NEVER returned in full to the caller. The verify endpoint returns a MfaMethodsSummary + updated session state; the initiate endpoint (owned by identity/auth) returns only the challenge_id + method + expires_at. Fields like webauthn_challenge (bytea) are for server-side use only.
